arts.ttl: Arsenal fans love what Mikel Arteta has done to Gabriel Magalhaes after noticing what he did at 9-2 up vs PSV
arts.sum: Arsenal fans noticed what Gabriel Magalhaes was spotted doing whilst the Gunners were 9-2 up in the tie against PSV Eindhoven. Arsenal are into the...

arts.ttl: Arsenal told how to beat Real Madrid in Champions League quarter-finals after Atletico penalty drama
arts.sum: Arsenal have the quality to compete with "any team" in the Champions League if they can repeat their performance from their 7-1 thumping of PSV, Nigel Winterburn claims.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes Champions League vow as Arsenal discover quarter-final opponents
arts.sum: Arsenal will take on holders Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-finals next month, the same stage where Mikel Arteta's side were knocked out last season

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury, suspension list and return dates for Chelsea clash: Bukayo Saka latest
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Arsenal's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Report: 'World-class' attacker could be willing to take pay cut amid Arsenal interest, he's out of contract this summer
arts.sum: Arsenal are set for a busy summer on the transfer front as Mikel Arteta looks to bolster his ranks ahead of another big season. The...

arts.ttl: Arsenal Want to Sign Ballon d’Or Contender as Berta Plots £300m Overhaul
arts.sum: Arsenal are among a number of Premier League clubs looking to seal a deal for Barcelona star Raphinha this summer.

arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes to Arsenal as €70m deal AGREED
arts.sum: The Gunners already want to sign Alexander Isak from their Premier League rivals and new sporting director Andrea Berta is drawing up plans to add Brazil international star Bruno to Mikel Arteta’s roster in the summer. The Emirates club already want to sign Alexander Isak from Newcastle but face a difficult test in landing either player.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's fringe players show they CAN step up against Real Madrid, writes ISAAN KHAN - it won't be easy, but here's why the Gunners are Champions League contenders
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE EMIRATES: With their dead-rubber Champions League last-16 second leg against PSV Eindhoven out of the way, Arsenal can now look forward.

arts.ttl: Why Declan Rice hit back at Arsenal statement as unique Champions League scenario plays out
arts.sum: As Oleksandr Zinchenko cut inside to score the sort of goal that he would have loved as a winger growing up, PSV's defence opened up. Although he didn't end up getting possession, Merino's run momentarily attracted the attention of the PSV backline, allowing Zinchenko to bend his way infield.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool, Arsenal & Man Utd keen on potential €60m transfer of 11 G/A midfielder
arts.sum: Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United are among the clubs showing an interest in the potential transfer of Nottingham Forest midfielder Morgan Gibbs-White. The England international has been in fine form for Forest this season, contributing a total of five goals and six assists from the middle of the park in 24 Premier League games.
